hero.sub: Hover over everyday moments and emotions to color your senses with fragrance

overlay.title: Afterglow
overlay.sub: Every emotion has blossomed into scent

emotions.text: A day I don't want to do anything

lines.desc:
When we're sad, happy, or want to share our hearts, we write.
Even in a single diary entry or a short message, emotions are woven in.
Writing is the most honest record of how we express ourselves.

A single familiar scent can revive a forgotten moment.
Scent connects people to people, and for some, it becomes a language that expresses who they are more deeply than words.

For centuries, research and attempts to connect scent with emotion and sensation have never ceased.
That accumulation grew the fragrance industry, and today people discover identity and narrative in scent.
NewNose completes that connection with data.

lines.text: Emotions become fragrance, preserved in data.
lines.desc:
Yet scent has long been understood through intuition alone.
NewNose builds a precise database linking emotion and scent by learning from tens of thousands of diary entries, public data, and the chemical properties of fragrance molecules.

lines.text: Data becomes a vast map of scent.
lines.desc:
Being able to analyze what was once abstract scent through quantitative data — that itself is innovation.
NewNose's scent map starts from personal diaries and grows into an infrastructure applicable to anyone, in any situation.

howItWorks.title: From daily emotions to your signature scent

steps.title: Write your diary
steps.desc:
Freely record what happened today and how you felt.
You can add emotion tags to capture the mood of your day.

steps.title: AI analyzes your emotions
steps.desc: From a month's worth of diary entries, the AI extracts emotion, sensory, and adjective keywords and finds patterns.

steps.title: Your scent recipe is created
steps.desc: Extracted keywords are matched against a database of 2,387 scent accords to compose your own recipe of top, middle, and base notes.

steps.title: Archived as a scent report
steps.desc:
That month's perfume is completed and saved to your archive.
Twelve perfume bottles are filled one by one.

part1.heading:
Everyone has their own
signature scent of life
part1.body:
We discovered fragrance in someone's diary.
Memories bloom into scent, and emotions linger as smell.
So why have we only focused on sight and sound?
Smell is the most primal and most personal sense.
NewNose gives that sense a language for the first time.
part1.accent: "Everyone deserves a scent of their own."

editorialCards.title: Emotional Mapping
editorialCards.desc: We translate your emotional curves into scent notes.

editorialCards.title: Memory Synthesis
editorialCards.desc: We weave forgotten fragments of memory back together through fragrance.

editorialCards.title: Personal Signature
editorialCards.desc: We suggest a unique scent that best represents you.

part2.heading:
When scent becomes data,
the world changes

visions.title: Hyper-personalized scent service
visions.desc:
A scent recipe that becomes more refined as your emotional data grows.
A fragrance that is uniquely yours.

visions.title: Psychotherapy & spatial design
visions.desc: A new methodology for designing spaces and experiences through emotion-scent mapping data.

visions.title: A fundamental sense for physical AI
visions.desc:
When digital AI understands smell, the world changes completely.
NewNose is building that language.

part2.footerPrefix: NewNose is not just an app.
part2.footerStrong: It is the first data infrastructure for creating the language of scent.

appCta.sub: Start now, and in one month you'll receive your very first personal scent recipe.
